case_title: ARJANG SASSANI VS. PABLO DE LA CRUZ JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2016 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506). THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS. THE MATTER IS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT (DEPT. 506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ JR, PABLO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SASSANI, ARJANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ JR, PABLO $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,130.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $100.00 OF THE JUDGMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30,2016, RETURN PLAINTIFF'S MICROWAVE TO HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SASSANI, ARJANG AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ JR, PABLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SASSANI, ARJANG SERVED JAN-20-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ JR, PABLO
